content: Lady Lovelace: Fuckin’ hell, Fusion’s Folly, you see that raider gang banging that pack of ferals by the bleachers earlier? Shit was more twisted than a Mirelurk’s dick. Fusion’s Folly: Oh, absolutely , darling. Nothing like watching those filthy ghouls get passed around like a bottle of Day Tripper. Though I must say, I prefer my partners with a little more... structural integrity. Lady Lovelace: Yeah, well, some of us don’t got the luxury of floatin’ above the mess. You ever let one of those rusted-up tin cans from the Rust Devils ride your thruster? Feels like gettin’ scraped raw with a buzzsaw. Fusion’s Folly: Darling, please, I’ve had  with better manners. Though that one with the power fist? Shame his brain was smoother than a Synth’s ass.

Lady Lovelace: Sounds like another poor bastard just got wrecked out there. Hope they at least got fucked before they got shot. Fusion’s Folly: Typical wasteland romance—blood, bullets, and a Stimpak lube job. Shall we place bets on if they make it through the night? Lady Lovelace: Fuck it. Ten caps says they’re finna get gangbanged by those Gunners before dawn. Fusion’s Folly: Oh, darling, that’s a sucker’s bet. Everybody loses out here… but not everybody screams as pretty.
